SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
